title: Junior Webanalyst & Tracking Specialist (m/w/d)
summary: Technically-oriented web analytics and tracking implementation role requiring JavaScript, Google Tag Manager, and Google Analytics proficiency — Boru's profile is analytics and BI-focused with no web tracking or front-end development background.
key_requirements: Degree in Informatics, Business Informatics, or Media Informatics, or equivalent (required)
Web development knowledge including JavaScript; TypeScript a plus (required)
Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics proficiency (required)
Client-side and server-side tag management configuration and implementation (required)
Up to 2 years relevant experience or internships/projects in the field (required)
Google Ads or other tracking/campaign tool experience (bonus)
Strong communication and consulting skills, ability to explain technical topics (required)
matched_skills: Data quality tracking and QA experience (Hapag-Lloyd agile sprint data artefact tracking)
Structured performance reporting and insight delivery
missing_skills: Google Tag Manager (GTM) — client-side and server-side
Web tracking strategy development and deployment
Informatics, Business Informatics, or Media Informatics degree background
Google Ads or campaign tracking tools
recommended_emphasis: Data quality and tracking QA work at Hapag-Lloyd (closest relevant experience)
Analytical reporting and translating technical data into stakeholder-ready insights
Willingness to learn new technologies quickly (position is junior/entry-level)
Project coordination and cross-team collaboration with development teams
language_requirement: German (primary working language, no explicit level stated) + English assumed; German B1+ should be sufficient for a junior role in an agency context
location_notes: Berlin, Stuttgart, or Duesseldorf with mobile/hybrid work options; Boru is in Lüneburg — relocation may be needed
risk_flags: Core technical stack (JavaScript, GTM, GA4) absent from Boru's CV — this is the primary job function
Degree mismatch: role targets Informatics/Business Informatics; Boru's background is Management and PR/Advertising
Boru has no web analytics or tag management project history
Role is highly technical and implementation-focused, not analytics/strategy-focused
